Income before provision for income taxes
Weighted-average shares used to compute earnings per share:

* Provision for income taxes includes a one-time, non-cash income tax charge of $15.93 billion accrued in the third quarter of 2025, related to the implementation of the One Big Beautiful Bill Act. Excluding this one-time tax charge, our third quarter 2025 effective tax rate would have decreased by 73 percentage points to 14%, compared to the reported effective tax rate of 87%.
